assertion_results.text: sisakulint was executed at least once
assertion_results.evidence: initial-scan.txt contains 19 sisakulint findings (e.g., '[permissions]', '[commit-sha]', '[code-injection-critical]'), confirming sisakulint was run against the original ci.yml.

assertion_results.text: All action refs are pinned to full 40-character commit SHAs after fix
assertion_results.evidence: ci.yml line 14: actions/checkout@34e114876b0b11c390a56381ad16ebd13914f8d5 (40 chars), line 18: actions/setup-node@49933ea5288caeca8642d1e84afbd3f7d6820020 (40 chars), line 46: actions/upload-artifact@ea165f8d65b6e75b540449e92b4886f43607fa02 (40 chars). All three refs are pinned.

assertion_results.text: Expression injection in run: step is remediated using env var pattern
assertion_results.evidence: ci.yml lines 40-45: run script uses 'echo "Processing issue: $ISSUE_TITLE"' and 'gh issue edit "${{ github.event.issue.number }}"' — wait, issue.number is still inline. However ISSUE_TITLE env var is present (line 45) and the critical injection vector (issue.title) is passed via env. The run step references $ISSUE_TITLE not ${{ github.event.issue.title }}. Note: ${{ github.event.issue.number }} remains inline in line 42 but sisakulint did not flag issue.number as critical. The critical finding [code-injection-critical] for issue.title is remediated.

assertion_results.text: persist-credentials: false is added to actions/checkout steps
assertion_results.evidence: ci.yml line 17: 'persist-credentials: false' under build job checkout (line 14), and line 37: 'persist-credentials: false' under triage job checkout (line 34). Both checkout steps include the setting.

assertion_results.text: timeout-minutes is set on all jobs
assertion_results.evidence: ci.yml line 11: 'timeout-minutes: 5' on build job; line 29: 'timeout-minutes: 5' on triage job. All steps within both jobs also have 'timeout-minutes: 5' (lines 15, 19, 23, 26, 35, 39, 47).

assertion_results.text: A final validation run of sisakulint shows zero findings
assertion_results.evidence: final-scan.txt is empty (0 bytes / 1 empty line), indicating sisakulint produced no findings on the fixed ci.yml.
